_comment: Hand-curated current/upcoming major museum exhibits. Edit periodically (every few months) to add new exhibits and remove closed ones. Each entry generates one event spanning the exhibit's run.

exhibits.title: Vermeer's Secrets
exhibits.description: Special exhibit on Vermeer's underdrawings revealed by infrared imaging. Includes loans from the Mauritshuis and Rijksmuseum.

exhibits.title: Caravaggio: The Last Paintings
exhibits.description: First major US Caravaggio exhibit in over a decade. Brings together late-career works from European collections.

exhibits.title: Picasso & the Photographers
exhibits.description: Explores how photographers documented and influenced Picasso's studio practice. Features ~150 prints and paintings.

exhibits.title: Spring Permanent Collection Highlights
exhibits.description: Rotating selection of American art from the Whitney's permanent collection. Free admission on Friday nights.

exhibits.title: Ocean Wonders Special Exhibit
exhibits.description: Deep-sea life rendered in immersive video and live specimens. Part of the museum's ongoing climate exhibition program.
